summary: Preserve first-class Context.dev operator workflows, public entity enrichment guards, crawl credit controls, and CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY auth precedence.
reason: The generated endpoint surface is complete but too raw for agent website-intelligence workflows, and the upstream Context.dev contract documents CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY rather than only the generated bearer-auth variable. The custom layer rejects sensitive/free-form entity-discover input, keeps failed API calls distinct from zero results, and caps multi-page crawls before spending credits.
validated_outcome: go test ./... and go test -race ./internal/cli pass; root help lists generated brand/web groups plus public workflows: scrape, crawl, extract, styleguide, screenshot, entity-discover, brand-brief, competitor-map, crawl-budget-plan, source-pack, website-change-digest, schema-lab, asset-pack, trust-check, and lead-enrich-batch.
